description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a fit build, standing with arms extended horizontally. The individual has short, styled hair and is wearing round sunglasses, fingerless gloves, a sleeveless crop top, and fitted jeans with a belt. Visible tattoos adorn both upper arms, with a prominent floral design on the left. The person is also wearing sturdy lace-up boots, and their overall appearance suggests a confident, urban style. Accessories such as the gloves and sunglasses add to the edgy, streetwise look. The figure's posture and attire are suitable for casual movement in an urban environment.
description: A fit adult with short hair, sunglasses, fingerless gloves, a crop top, jeans, and boots, featuring visible arm tattoos and an urban, confident style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the crop top, sunglasses, gloves, belt, and tattoos on both arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm tattoo, and the fitted jeans and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the crop top, both arm tattoos, and the back pockets of the jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, right arm tattoo, and the side of the boots and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless crop top, fitted jeans, fingerless gloves, belt, sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
